positive: A stylized, minimalist forest animal illustration featuring a friendly fox nestled amongst glowing bioluminescent flora. The fox should have a sleek, warm orange silhouette against a deep, cosmic indigo background. Composition should be centered, highly detailed in the flora elements, with negative space framing the fox. Use a high-contrast, engraved woodcut style mixed with modern vector art, reminiscent of illuminated manuscripts. Focus on strong silhouettes and clean lines suitable for apparel printing. Magical, whimsical, clean lines, symmetrical composition.
negative: low resolution, blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, logo, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, muted colors, realistic photo, oil painting
